summary: Live-applied ADR 0261 from the latest realistic origin/main baseline `bbb0f66b8ec995dfa3ecdd7bac9156ed664157cc` (VERSION 0.177.92, platform_version 0.130.61) on `codex/ws-0261-main-finish`, converged the private browser-runner runtime plus governed API gateway publication, fixed the packaged API gateway config lookup and governed Dify JSON content-type regression, and verified the private, operator, and Dify browser-runner paths end to end with artifacts.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml python -m pytest tests/test_browser_runner_client.py tests/test_packaged_repo_paths.py tests/test_agent_tool_registry.py -q` passed with `18 passed`; `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with fastapi --with httpx python -m pytest tests/test_browser_runner_service.py -q` passed with `3 passed`; and `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with httpx --with cryptography --with fastapi python -m pytest tests/test_api_gateway.py -k dify_tools_route -q` passed with `2 passed`.

verification.check: Governed tool registry and packaged repo-path validation
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/agent_tool_registry.py --validate` completed successfully after the packaged sibling `config/` fallback landed in `platform/repo.py`, `platform/ledger/_common.py`, and `scripts/workflow_catalog.py`.

`make converge-browser-runner env=production` completed successfully from the exact-main replay baseline and republished the private browser-runner runtime plus the governed `/v1/browser-runner/*` route.

verification.check: API gateway replay with Dify browser-runner fix
verification.observed: After the packaged config lookup fix and automatic JSON `Content-Type` header fix in `scripts/browser_runner_client.py`, `make converge-api-gateway env=production` completed successfully with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 ok=278 changed=116 failed=0 skipped=38`.

verification.check: Private, operator, and Dify browser-runner proofs
verification.observed: The private browser-runner `/healthz` and smoke flow succeeded through a local tunnel, the operator route at `https://api.lv3.org/v1/browser-runner` returned `{"status":"ok","artifact_root":"/data/artifacts"}` and a successful smoke session for the platform-context bearer token, and the governed Dify route `https://api.lv3.org/v1/dify-tools/browser-run-session` returned HTTP 200 with heading `LV3 Browser Runner Smoke`, result `BROWSER RUNNER`, plus screenshot and PDF artifacts.

notes: The exact-main replay baseline at verification time was origin/main commit `bbb0f66b8ec995dfa3ecdd7bac9156ed664157cc` with `VERSION` `0.177.92` and `platform_version` `0.130.61`.
The operator route requires a `platform-operator` bearer token; the legacy platform-context token remained the correct proof identity because `lv3-agent-hub` is `platform-read` only.

origin/main advanced during closeout to commit `46df65e7f2227ca79a38035d2d24f53b6c02b5f8` with `VERSION` `0.177.93` and `platform_version` `0.130.62`, so the final merge path must reconcile that newer upstream before landing on main.
Protected integration files (`VERSION`, `changelog.md`, `README.md`, and `versions/stack.yaml`) intentionally remain pending until the final mainline merge and replay.
